meaning_en: a round fruit that is typically red or green
example_sentences: I eat an apple every morning. | She picked a red apple from the tree.

meaning_en: to move quickly using your legs
example_sentences: He can run very fast. | We run in the park together. | Don't run in the hallway.
The garden is beautiful in spring.
She ran quickly to catch the bus.
The discovery was significant for science.
